senses.definition: a movie with many exciting scenes involving fights, chases, and explosions

examples.x: The latest action movie features intense fight scenes and jaw-dropping stunts.
Fans of action movies eagerly anticipate the release of the next installment in their favorite franchise.
Many action movies are known for their charismatic heroes who always save the day in spectacular fashion.
He enjoys action movies because of their adrenaline-pumping action sequences and suspenseful plotlines.
He rewatched his favorite action movie from the 1990s.

senses.definition: a movie in which animated characters move

examples.x: Children often enjoy animation because of the colorful characters and imaginative worlds.
The studio's latest animation received critical acclaim for its stunning visuals and heartfelt storytelling.
Some animations appeal to both children and adults, with clever humor and deeper themes woven into the story.
Many classic fairy tales have been adapted into animations, captivating audiences with their magical charm.
The animation was full of bright colors and whimsical characters.

senses.definition: a meeting during which actors, singers, or dancers show their skills and abilities in front of casting directors, producers, or other decision-makers to be considered for a role in a production

examples.x: She nervously prepared for her audition by practicing her lines over and over.
The director was impressed by his audition and offered him the role on the spot.
After several rounds of auditions, they finally found the perfect actor to play the villain in the movie."
Auditions for the school play were open to all students, regardless of their experience level.

senses.definition: a small place at a cinema, theater, etc. from which tickets are bought
all the actors and actresses in a movie, play, etc.

examples.x: She was excited to join the cast of the upcoming film.
The director introduced the cast during the press conference.
A talented cast can make even a simple story compelling.
The cast worked together for months to perfect their performances.
An all-star cast was chosen for the high-budget movie.

senses.definition: a well-known and highly respected piece of writing, music, or movie that is considered valuable and of high quality

examples.x: The book is regarded as a classic in English literature.
Casablanca is a classic that film enthusiasts love.
Pride and Prejudice remains a timeless classic in literature.

senses.definition: a person who wears a wig and a red nose to entertain an audience
someone who evaluates and provides opinions or judgments about various forms of art, literature, performances, or other creative works

examples.x: Her reviews as a food critic are highly anticipated, as she provides detailed critiques of restaurants and dishes based on taste, presentation, and service.

senses.definition: the process or action of evaluating and giving personal reviews of a work of art

examples.x: Criticism of a play can influence audience perceptions and discussions about its themes and messages.
The criticism of the film's pacing centered on the slow first act, which some viewers found tedious
The politician brushed aside the criticism of his policies, insisting he was acting in the best interests of the country.

senses.definition: to give instructions to actors and organize the scenes or flow of a movie, play, etc.

examples.x: During rehearsals, the director focused on directing the actors' movements and expressions to convey the intended emotions.
She enjoys directing school plays because she gets to work closely with the young actors and help them improve.
The director spent hours on set, directing the actors to bring their characters to life.
She was hired to direct the actors in the upcoming theater production.
She directed the actors to experiment with different emotions to find the best delivery.

senses.definition: related to acting, plays, or the theater

examples.x: Her interest in dramatic literature led her to study theater.

senses.definition: to choose and arrange the parts that are crucial to the story of a movie, show, etc. and cut out unnecessary ones

examples.x: After shooting wrapped, the director and editor collaborated to edit the documentary.
The television producer hired an expert to edit the pilot episode.
In the editing room, the team worked tirelessly to edit the action sequences.
The independent filmmaker spent months editing her debut feature film.
The editor used advanced editing software to edit the comedy special.

senses.definition: the person who is in charge of arranging or removing the scenes of a movie, show, etc.

examples.x: She's an experienced film editor who has worked on several award-winning movies.
The editor meticulously cut and rearranged scenes to enhance the pacing of the film.
He's collaborating closely with the director and cinematographer as the editor of the upcoming TV series.
The editor used special effects and sound editing techniques to enhance the final cut of the movie.
The editor's skillful editing transformed the raw footage into a captivating documentary.

senses.definition: providing amusement, often through humor, drama, or skillful performance

examples.x: Her entertaining storytelling had everyone at the party enthralled.
The magician's entertaining tricks amazed both children and adults alike."
We spent the evening playing board games, finding them surprisingly entertaining and a great way to connect with friends.
Despite a predictable plot, the movie's entertaining cast and fast-paced action sequences made it a fun summer watch.
The entertaining performance by the band had the crowd dancing and singing along.

senses.definition: an event during which a wide range of new movies from different countries are shown to the public

examples.x: The Cannes Film Festival is one of the most prestigious film festivals in the world, attracting filmmakers and celebrities from around the globe.
Local film festivals provide a platform for independent filmmakers to showcase their work to a wider audience
Attending a film festival allows enthusiasts to discover new and innovative films that may not receive mainstream attention.
Winning an award at a major film festival can significantly boost a filmmaker's career and help their work gain recognition.

senses.definition: a style of art, music, literature, film, etc. that has its own special features

examples.x: Impressionism is a genre of painting known for its focus on light and color.
Ballet is a classical genre of dance that emphasizes grace and technique.
Abstract art is a genre that breaks away from traditional representation.
The Renaissance period saw the emergence of the genre of portraiture.
Film noir is a genre known for its dark themes and moody visuals.

senses.definition: the specific role given to an actor
to provide money for and be in charge of the making of a movie, play, etc.

examples.x: She produced a TV series about adopted children.
The video was produced and directed by filmmaker Neil Campbell.
The wealthy philanthropist decided to produce a documentary on environmental conservation.
The renowned director secured funding from investors to produce a groundbreaking science fiction film.
The talented playwright was eager to produce her latest play.

senses.definition: a dramatic genre characterized by exaggerated emotions, intense conflicts, etc., often trying to create strong emotional reactions in the audience

examples.x: The movie descended into melodrama in the final act, with characters delivering over-the-top speeches and indulging in exaggerated emotional outbursts.
The reality TV show thrived on melodrama, constantly stirring up conflict and featuring highly emotional confrontations between cast members.

senses.definition: someone who produces or directs films

examples.x: As a movie maker, she enjoys bringing stories to life through the magic of cinema.
Many aspiring movie makers start out by creating short films to hone their craft.
The movie maker carefully selects actors, locations, and props to convey the vision of the film.
He became a successful movie maker after directing several blockbuster hits.
Movie makers often collaborate with writers, cinematographers, and editors to create compelling films.

senses.definition: any theatrical performance that combines singing, dancing, and acting to tell a story
a written text that a movie, show, or play is based on

examples.x: The actor memorized his lines from the script before the performance.
The movie script was praised for its witty dialogue and emotional depth.
She worked with the director to revise the script before filming began.
The script for the play included detailed instructions for each scene.
He submitted his script to the studio, hoping for it to be turned into a film.
The cast received their scripts ahead of the first rehearsal.
The film's script was adapted from a popular novel.

senses.definition: someone whose job is to write the story of a movie, play, TV show, etc.

examples.x: The scriptwriter spent months developing the movie’s dialogue.
A skilled scriptwriter knows how to create compelling characters.
The scriptwriter revised the script based on the director’s feedback.
Every successful show relies on a talented scriptwriter.
The scriptwriter crafted an engaging story for the new drama series.

senses.definition: a movie with no spoken dialogue
techniques used in movies and other media to create cool visuals or sounds using computers or filmmaking tricks to add excitement

examples.x: The blockbuster movie featured breathtaking special effects that amazed audiences.
The wizardry of special effects brought the fantastical creatures in the film to life.
Her favorite part of the movie was the impressive special effects that made the spaceship look like it was flying through space.
Special effects can add excitement and realism to action-packed scenes in movies.
Without special effects, fantasy movies wouldn’t be as visually impressive.

senses.definition: an elevated area, especially in theaters, on which artists perform for the audience

examples.x: The actor stepped onto the stage to deliver his monologue.
The band played their hit songs on the main stage at the festival.
She stood on the stage, taking a bow as the audience applauded.
The theater crew set up the props and lighting on the stage for the upcoming play.
The comedian's performance had the entire stage lit up with laughter.

senses.definition: a famous and popular performer, artist, etc.

examples.x: The actor became a star after his breakout role in the movie.
She is a star in the world of fashion, known for her innovative designs.
The athlete is a star on the basketball court, admired by fans worldwide.
The singer’s latest album made her a star in the music industry.
She became a major star after her breakout role in the film.
He’s a big star in the music world, known for his chart-topping hits.

senses.definition: a fictional character with special and strange powers
an extremely popular and well-known performer or sports player

examples.x: The actor became a superstar after his breakout role in the blockbuster movie.
She is a superstar in the world of tennis, winning multiple Grand Slam titles.
The singer’s latest album solidified her status as a global superstar.
He is a superstar chef, known for his innovative culinary creations.
The young athlete is being hailed as the next superstar in professional basketball.

senses.definition: a person who is respected or admired like a god by other people

examples.x: The rock star became a demigod to his fans.
The chess prodigy, still a teenager, was already considered a demigod in the competitive chess world.
The revolutionary leader was seen as a demigod by the people.
The fashion designer, known for her groundbreaking designs, was a demigod in the fashion world, setting trends and breaking boundaries.

senses.definition: a movie, novel, etc. with an exciting plot that deals with crime

examples.x: He enjoys watching thrillers with intense action and unpredictable twists.
She’s a fan of crime thrillers, especially those with complex plots.
The thriller movie had the audience on the edge of their seats.
They recommended a thriller for the next movie night.

senses.definition: a play with sad events, especially one that the main character dies at the end

examples.x: Shakespeare's 'Hamlet' is a classic tragedy, depicting the tragic downfall of its title character.
The Greek playwright Sophocles is famous for his tragedies, such as 'Oedipus Rex' and 'Antigone'.
The film adaptation stayed true to the original tragedy elements, eliciting strong emotional responses from audiences.

senses.definition: a selection from different parts of a movie, TV series, games, etc. shown before they become available to the public

examples.x: The studio released a second trailer with more footage from the film.
The trailer for the highly anticipated superhero movie was released online, causing a frenzy among fans.
After watching the trailer, she couldn't wait to see the film and learn more about the intriguing storyline.
The action-packed trailer showcased thrilling stunts and special effects, leaving viewers excited for the movie.
Audiences eagerly watched the trailer to get a sneak peek of the upcoming romantic comedy.

senses.definition: the main bad character in a movie, story, play, etc.

examples.x: The villain plotted to take over the kingdom.
He played the villain in the new action film.
The villain’s motives were revealed at the end of the story.
A good villain makes the story more exciting.
The audience booed when the villain appeared on stage.

senses.definition: a movie or book that usually involves the lives and adventures of cowboys and settlers in American West
